assertions.title: Existing stored player search reconciles against live Riot history

commands: python -c "import urllib.request, json; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen('http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/account?gameName=Bumsdito&tagLine=3005', timeout=30)); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))"

python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/stored-matches?puuid={puuid}&limit=10&offset=0', timeout=60)); print(json.dumps({'storedTop10':[m['id'] for m in data.get('matches',[])],'totalCount':data.get('totalCount')}, indent=2))"

python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/match-history?puuid={puuid}&count=10&start=0', timeout=90)); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))"

python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; url=f'http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/match-performance?matchId=NA1_5524144855&userPuuid={puuid}'; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(url, timeout=120)); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))"
observedOutputs: GET / -> 200 and GET /player/Bumsdito%233005 -> 200 on the shared local app.
GET /api/account?gameName=Bumsdito&tagLine=3005 returned the existing stored account with puuid 0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ.
Initial GET /api/stored-matches top 10 contained only two Mar 30 recent IDs followed by older Mar 24/Mar 18 rows, proving the player already had DB-backed stored history before reconciliation.
GET /api/match-history top 10 returned newer Riot IDs including NA1_5524144855 and NA1_5524114794 that were absent from the stored top page.

GET /api/match-performance?matchId=NA1_5524144855&userPuuid=... returned success with a reconstructed summary and syncMetadata.recentMatchWindow=25, exercising the reconciliation runtime for the returning player.

assertions.title: Missing recent matches surface in DB-backed history without duplicates

commands:
python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; mids=['NA1_5524091304','NA1_5523824955','NA1_5523791185','NA1_5523755935','NA1_5519761959','NA1_5519756542']; out=[]
for mid in mids:
 data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/match-performance?matchId={mid}&userPuuid={puuid}', timeout=120)); out.append({'matchId': mid, 'success': data.get('success'), 'summaryId': data.get('matchSummary',{}).get('id')})
print(json.dumps(out, indent=2))"

python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(f'http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/stored-matches?puuid={puuid}&limit=10&offset=0', timeout=60)); print(json.dumps({'ids':[m['id'] for m in data.get('matches',[])],'count':len(data.get('matches',[])),'totalCount':data.get('totalCount')}, indent=2))"
observedOutputs: Six previously missing recent Riot IDs all returned success through /api/match-performance with summaryId equal to the requested matchId.
A post-reconciliation GET /api/stored-matches top 10 exactly matched the live Riot top 10 order.
No duplicate IDs appeared in the re-read stored top page.
totalCount grew from 61 before reconciliation to 69 after the missing recent rows were persisted.

assertions.title: Stale derived rows refresh truthfully after recent-window reconciliation

commands: python -c "import urllib.request, json; puuid='0Ve4jH7Gtd8eZLCcLVmlNjX-B3yYdJUxRYx15CU9wro2R_eEnMx5eDUaZb0mtPvAyYMkod9TDdI9mQ'; req=urllib.request.Request('http://127.0.0.1:3005/api/player-matches/stale-ids', data=json.dumps({'puuid': puuid, 'matchIds': ['NA1_5524772591','NA1_5524751003','NA1_5524144855','NA1_5524114794','NA1_5524091304','NA1_5523824955','NA1_5523791185','NA1_5523755935','NA1_5519761959','NA1_5519756542']}).encode('utf-8'), headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}); data=json.load(urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=120)); print(json.dumps(data, indent=2))"
observedOutputs: POST /api/player-matches/stale-ids for the reconciled recent window returned {"staleMatchIds": []}, indicating no remaining stale derived rows after the refresh path ran.
Each reconciled /api/match-performance response included syncMetadata.recentMatchWindow=25, consistent with the persisted freshness window used for stale checks.
pnpm test passed with 10 files and 58 tests.
pnpm run typecheck passed with exit code 0.

frictions: Browser automation remained unavailable on this Windows host, so validation used the approved tests-plus-dev-server-evidence fallback against the shared local app on port 3005.
The stale-id API is POST-only; a GET probe returned HTTP 405 before the correct POST validation call was used.
summary: All three freshness assertions passed on the shared local app. The existing Bumsdito#3005 player started with older DB-backed history, live Riot history exposed missing recent IDs, runtime reconciliation persisted those IDs into the DB-backed top page without duplicates, and stale-row checks for the refreshed recent window returned no stale matches.
